name: Cowork Scheduled Tasks
description: Replaces session-scoped CronCreate approach with Cowork's native Scheduled Tasks panel. config/scheduled-tasks.json restructured with configured status flags and copy-paste prompts per task. New rigby-scheduled-setup skill presents unconfigured tasks as copy-paste cards. chief-morning boot check surfaces a one-line notice when tasks need setup.

files.description: Cowork-native scheduled tasks config: configured flag, cowork_prompt, schedule_display, keep_awake per task
New Rigby skill: surface unconfigured Cowork scheduled tasks as copy-paste setup cards

changelog: Replaces CronCreate session approach with Cowork-native Scheduled Tasks panel
config/scheduled-tasks.json restructured with configured flag, cowork_prompt, schedule_display, and keep_awake per task
New rigby-scheduled-setup skill: presents unconfigured tasks as copy-paste setup cards for Cowork
chief-morning boot check notice for unconfigured tasks (personal block — configure locally)
